prerequisites.value: Wis 13, Improved Unarmed Strike, Acrobatics 2 ranks, Climb 2 ranks.

description.value: **Benefit:** You add your Wisdom modifier to Acrobatics checks in addition to your Dexterity modifier. While using this style, when you are adjacent to a vertical surface or object capable of supporting your weight, such as a wall or a tree, you gain a +1 bonus on melee attack rolls against opponents your size or smaller, as if you were on higher ground.
